note: Spec/plan/WP prompts hand-authored (spec-kitty CLI unavailable in this environment; mirrors the report-ia-01ria7 format). Viewer-side URL exclusion for issue #209. Five WPs; three scope decisions recorded as adjustable defaults. check:spec-kitty passes.

Regex-aware report-side exclusion filter. compileExclusionPattern() mirrors src/lib/urls.js compilePattern (substring case-insensitive, /regex/ with flags, invalid-regex → literal substring fallback); filterBugsByExclusion compiles matchers once (hot path over affected_pages). matchesExclusionPattern/filterBugsByExclusion now exported for tests. +6 cases in tests/unit/url-exclusion.test.js. Config baseline (www.cms.gov [.aspx]) unchanged. npm run test:unit 271 pass; i18n:check clean (no new strings).

Viewer exclusion control on the accessibility page. exclusionBox() (collapsed .exclude-box, textarea + Apply/Clear, per-domain data-domain-key) + exclusionFilterScript() (PE: reads localStorage['vital-exclude:<key>'], compile() mirrors WP01 substring/-regex-/invalid-fallback, hides matching affected-page <li>, hides a finding only when its list is complete (data-complete=1) and all pages excluded — never on a truncated sample, filters counts via data-excluded + window.__vitalApplyFilter). Added data-example-url + data-excluded to .bug and data-complete to ul.affected; bug filter apply() now skips excluded and recomputes effTotal/effPrioritized (identical when nothing excluded). ~12 lines CSS reusing existing tokens. Verified end-to-end in real Chromium (hide/keep/li-filter/persist-on-reload/clear) and by a render test. npm run test:unit 272 pass; i18n:extract → template 571; i18n:check clean. e2e not run (scanner needs chrome-headless-shell, absent in this env). FR-02/03/04/05, C-01/03/04/07/08 satisfied.

PR #213 merged the branch into main at WP01 (c331bdc46). Per branch policy (a merged PR is finished), rebased the unmerged WP02 commit onto origin/main so nothing stacks on merged history; WP03+ continue from there. Follow-up work needs a NEW PR.

Landing-page placement + cross-page shared state. exclusionBox()+exclusionFilterScript() reused in renderDomainReport directly under the site-inventory meta line; same localStorage['vital-exclude:<key>'] store shared with the accessibility page. Script gained hasFindings branch: on a page with no findings list it shows an info banner ('N pattern(s) active — filter the Accessibility findings') instead of a 0-hidden banner. C-02: added #score-scope-note (hidden), revealed by the script only when exclusions are active; the headline score is never recomputed server-side. Verified cross-page in real Chromium over HTTP (set /medicare/ on landing → Accessibility page shows only the non-medicare finding, textarea prefilled) + render test. npm run test:unit 273 pass; i18n template 573; i18n:check clean. FR-01 and C-02 satisfied.
